resources.title: Resume template - Clean and Formal
resources.description:
Adapated from /EngineeringResume - a clean, formal and effective resume template.
NOTE: Click File, Make a Copy and then edit your resume. DO NOT REQUEST EDIT ACCESS IN THE ATTACHED DOCUMENT.

resources.title: Comprehensive Resume Guidebook
resources.description: Adapted from /EngineeringResume. A comprehensive guide on how to format resume, add appropriate content, write content and what to avoid.

resources.title: Interviewing.io
resources.description: Anonymous mock interviews with staff engineers from Google, Facebook, Amazon, and Netflix. Includes excellent video archives.

resources.title: ATS Checker - My Perfect Resume
resources.description: Check your resume for ATS compatibility. (Not very important for AU Placements and Internship but good to check)

resources.title: Pramp
resources.description: Free, peer-to-peer technical mock interview platform matching you with peers to practice coding, system design, and behavioral questions.
